Create an append-log tier over a Node filesystem backend (D106 passive storage).

## Import

```ts
import { fileAppendLog } from "@graphrefly/ts/storage/node";
```

## Signature

```ts

	dir: string,
	opts: FileAppendLogOptions<T> = {},
): AppendLogStorageTier<T>
```
